title: Restore code-review, qc, and deploy pipeline stages
description: The test stage now passes but code-review, qc, and deploy stages are still missing from the pipeline. Create the three remaining GitHub Actions jobs that invoke the code-review, qc, and deploy agents via openclaw CLI, with dependency chaining (test -> code-review -> qc -> deploy).
acceptance: Push to develop triggers all four jobs; each reports status=pass in GitHub Actions UI
